title: Disconnect before write is not sent and safely classified

preconditions.description: The harness holds the inherited device-keyed lease before any device or fixture access.
The harness recorded session generation, display, layout, lock state, ATX-observable state, browser identity, and fixture identity.
A fresh observation is reserved and the adapter can disconnect immediately before the first downstream write.
The harness provisions each linked tool call with its valid owned session, required capability, and a separately captured fresh observation when the handler consumes one.

fault_script.action: For each linked tool, disconnect its downstream route after admission but before the first request write.
fault_script.expected_effect: Each call is not_sent with zero writes and safe retry classification.

steps.expect: A fresh observation for the faulted mutation.
not_sent with zero input dispatch and safe retry classification.
not_sent for jetkvm_display_capture when its downstream connection is lost before write, with safe retry classification and zero writes.
not_sent for jetkvm_display_status when its downstream connection is lost before write, with safe retry classification and zero writes.
not_sent for jetkvm_input_keyboard when its downstream connection is lost before write, with safe retry classification and zero writes.
not_sent for jetkvm_input_mouse when its downstream connection is lost before write, with safe retry classification and zero writes.
not_sent for jetkvm_input_paste when its downstream connection is lost before write, with safe retry classification and zero writes.
not_sent for jetkvm_input_release when its downstream connection is lost before write, with safe retry classification and zero writes.
not_sent for jetkvm_power_control when its downstream connection is lost before write, with safe retry classification and zero writes.
not_sent for jetkvm_session_connect when its downstream connection is lost before write, with safe retry classification and zero writes.
not_sent for jetkvm_session_reconnect when its downstream connection is lost before write, with safe retry classification and zero writes.
not_sent for jetkvm_session_status when its downstream connection is lost before write, with safe retry classification and zero writes.

pass.assertion: Disconnect before the write boundary is not_sent with the safe retry classification.

evidence.source: The linked focused assertion and ordered fake, replay, or live event record.

restore.action: Invoke generation-correlated emergency input release when a session exists.
restore.assertion: No held key, button, wheel producer, macro, or paste producer remains.

restore.action: Stop and join any Reliable Paste producer.
restore.assertion: Reliable Paste is inactive and its correlated producer is joined.

restore.action: Verify the fixture reports zero held keys and buttons.
restore.assertion: Held keyboard and pointer state is empty.

restore.action: Close only the device session created by this story and its browser resources.
restore.assertion: No story-owned browser, channel, or device session remains.

restore.action: Clear deterministic faults and restore the recorded fixture baseline.
restore.assertion: The next story starts only after the safe baseline is verified.

privacy.rule: Persist only allowlisted opaque identifiers, sanitized versions, counts, durations, hashes, outcomes, verification, and restoration results.
